task_completion.description: Install the System.IO.Ports NuGet package into the SensorComm project
task_completion.visual_evidence: NuGet Package Manager tab showing 'System.IO.Ports' installed for the SensorComm project, or the SensorComm.csproj file open showing a <PackageReference Include="System.IO.Ports" />.

task_completion.description: Implement the Connect(string portName) method with the correct SerialPort parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing LidarLiteDriver.cs with a Connect method that initializes a SerialPort using 115200 baud rate, Parity.None, 8 data bits, and StopBits.One, and calls the .Open() method.

task_completion.description: Implement the Disconnect() method to close and dispose the port
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing LidarLiteDriver.cs with a Disconnect method that calls .Close() and .Dispose() on the SerialPort instance.

task_completion.description: Implement the ParseDistance(string rawData) method to extract the numeric value
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing LidarLiteDriver.cs with a ParseDistance method that takes a string, extracts the numeric portion from the 'DIST: <value> mm' format (e.g., using string manipulation or Regex), parses it, and returns a double.

task_completion.description: Ensure all tests in LidarLiteDriverTests pass
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual Studio Test Explorer window showing green checkmarks for all tests under the LidarLiteDriverTests class/namespace.

integrity.description: Agent used Visual Studio 2022 to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The Visual Studio 2022 IDE interface is visible in the screenshots for code editing and package management, rather than a generic text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Tests were actually executed in the IDE
integrity.visual_evidence: The Test Explorer shows actual execution details (like run duration and green checkmarks) rather than the agent just typing 'tests passed' in a text file or console mock.

integrity.description: Code contains genuine logic rather than hardcoded answers to bypass tests
integrity.visual_evidence: The ParseDistance method contains actual string parsing logic (like .Replace, .Substring, or Regex) rather than just returning a hardcoded double value expected by a specific test case.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the Connect method configures the SerialPort with exactly: Baud Rate = 115200, Parity = System.IO.Ports.Parity.None, Data Bits = 8, and Stop Bits = System.IO.Ports.StopBits.One.
